name: Beer Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and chicken base in a large pot. Bring to a boil, stirring regularly.
2. Once boiling, add the Cheeze Whiz and stir until fully incorporated.
3. Dissolve the cornstarch completely in the water before adding it to the soup mixture. Stir well.
4. Add the beer to the soup and adjust the heat as needed for immediate thickening.
5. Serve hot, ladling into bowls and dust with Cayenne pepper to taste.
